description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in PMECMS 1.0 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the config[pathMod] parameter to index.php in (1) mod/image/, (2) mod/liens/, (3) mod/liste/, (4) mod/special/, or (5) mod/texte/.
